title: Automate Assigning of Items to Guest Users
excerpt: Is there a way to automate assigning of items to guests? Like an app from the market place or something?

posts.author: Chester (Chester Alvin Escorpiso)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to automate assigning of items to guests? Like an app from the market place or something?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Chester,

Are you interested in assigning guests prior to them accessing the board? I ask this as you can assign the guest using our native automations as long as the guest has been invited to the board.

Let me know if I’ve misunderstood!

posts.author: Chester (Chester Alvin Escorpiso)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Bianca, thanks for your response. I figured out how to do it now. Thank you. So, what I was initially trying to do was when an item is created on one of my boards, it creates an item in another board. I was trying to create an item that’s already assigned at the time of creation. It did not occur to me that I can just create an automation to assign on the receiving board.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad to hear you got this sorted - thanks for the update!
